description: Capital Stack Optimizer — constructs, analyzes, and optimizes capital structures for real estate investment

hard_stops.description: Capital stack cannot be modeled without a deal record in the Vault
hard_stops.message: A deal record with total project cost is required before modeling the capital stack.

hard_stops.description: Total sources cannot exceed total uses by more than 5%
hard_stops.message: Total sources exceed total uses by more than 5%. Reconcile the capital stack before proceeding.

hard_stops.description: Total debt cannot exceed maximum leverage ratio (Tier 2 configurable, default 75% LTC)
hard_stops.message: Total leverage exceeds the maximum LTC ratio. Reduce debt or increase equity to proceed.

hard_stops.description: LP + GP split at any waterfall tier cannot exceed 100%
hard_stops.message: Waterfall distribution splits must total 100% at every tier. Check promote structure.
The modeled capital stack results in negative equity. Adjust sources or uses.

soft_flags.description: Sources do not equal uses (gap exists but within 5%)
soft_flags.message: Sources and uses do not balance. Identify the shortfall or excess before closing.

soft_flags.description: WACC exceeds unlevered yield — leverage destroys value
soft_flags.message: Blended cost of capital exceeds unlevered yield. Leverage is destroying value.

soft_flags.description: LP IRR in base case falls below Tier 2 target
soft_flags.message: LP IRR is below target. Consider restructuring the capital stack.

soft_flags.description: Downside scenario shows negative levered IRR
soft_flags.message: Downside scenario projects negative levered IRR. This deal has significant loss risk.

soft_flags.description: Debt service coverage ratio below minimum threshold
soft_flags.message: DSCR is below the minimum. Debt service exceeds safe coverage.

soft_flags.description: Aggregate capital raise may approach SEC registration thresholds
soft_flags.message: Capital raise may trigger SEC registration requirements. Consult securities counsel.

soft_flags.description: Exit cap rate spread over going-in is narrower than target
soft_flags.message: Exit cap spread is below target. Exit assumptions may be aggressive.
